3253280.name: Dimension Quest Pinball Season Pass - Spring
3253280.description:
Looking for a way to cool down after a long day? This pass provides exclusive access to the game's Spring Healing event, allowing you to play it as you please! Includes the following:

- Access to the Spring event level pack (it's in the event tab)

Note that purchasing this does NOT complete the spring event's ten levels, it merely unlocks them. The spring event is planned to be the only event exclusive to the DLC pass system due to its sheer size eclipsing the main game.

Gain full access to the Spring Healing event, a small-scale turn based RPG staring Daisy Marina, a powerful water fairy with a mysterious past! Follow her adventure through the ages as she rebuilds her destroyed home and comes face to face with foes both past and present.

Wait, did you just say "Turn Based RPG"?

That we did! Daisy's adventure will take her through a new gameplay style in the form of a turn based action RPG! Time your inputs perfectly for bonus damage, respond in time to counter enemy attacks in style, and level up to grow stronger and take on increasingly powerful foes! Take on challenging bosses across the depths of Fairin Woods, from a troubled queen bee to an infuriatingly persistent lumberjack! What awaits Daisy at the end of the line? Only one way to find out...

Good luck out there, Daisy!
